key.name: active-theme
key.description: The visual theme rendered onto the desktop background.

key.name: background-color
key.description: Colour of the sphere and the overlay drawn behind it.

key.name: background-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the background colour around the globe. 1.0 is solid; 0.0 shows the wallpaper behind it.

key.name: globe-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the sphere itself. 1.0 is solid; 0.0 makes the globe see-through to the wallpaper.

key.name: rotation-speed
key.description: Multiplier applied to the globe's base rotation speed.

key.name: fps
key.description: Maximum redraws per second. Lower values save power.
